/ucrt64/bin/CC.exe -isystem /ucrt64/include CMakeFiles/ElementalFighters.dir/main.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/ElementalFighters.dir/Game.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/ElementalFighters.dir/Fighter.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/ElementalFighters.dir/Attack.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/ElementalFighters.dir/ParticleSystem.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/ElementalFighters.dir/CartoonRenderer.cpp.obj -o ElementalFighters  /ucrt64/bin/libsfml-graphics-2.dll /ucrt64/bin/libsfml-window-2.dll /ucrt64/bin/libsfml-system-2.dll
